Title: Miss Chinatown contestants in lineup
Description: The Miss Chinatown pageant was held by the Chinese American Citizens Alliance (CACA) as a part of their Independence Day picnic celebrations at the Old Hearst Ranch (Hacienda del Pozo de Verona) in Pleasanton, California. Handwritten on verso: "Waiting for the judge [to] announce the winner".
